title: Automation QA Engineer
responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in testing, jira, sql, postman, cypress. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: VectorApps is hiring a junior automation qa engineer to support validating product quality through manual and automated testing.
raw_text: Vacancy V041: Automation QA Engineer at VectorApps. Location: Kyiv. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 0.7 years. Required skills: testing, jira, sql, postman, cypress, api testing, playwright. Optional skills: mobile testing, ci/cd, bug reporting. Responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams.
